title: rosa canina var. montana
intro: Rosa canina var. montana is a variant of the wild rose plant, also known as the dog rose, which is a shrub or small tree native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The medicinal properties of Rosa canina var. montana include its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its rich antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of using this plant include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rosa canina var. montana include rose hips tea, rose hips oil, and rose hips capsules, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
